summary: Soundboard capture of a killer 1986 show marred by muddy sound and occasional drop‑outs.
review: Fans rave that the performance on this December 28, 1986 recording is a must‑hear, even noting that “Marty was there” and praising the Jerry-led tunes. However, reviewers repeatedly flag technical flaws – noticeable mud‑dying of the mix and early‑song drop‑outs that detract from an otherwise great show.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is praised (high rating) while recording quality is criticized for mud and drop‑outs, resulting in a solid but not outstanding overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Muddy mix throughout; noticeable drop‑outs especially at the start of the first song; overall listenable but lacking clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set list is generally well received, though reviewers note a mislabeling error (Scarlet Begonias actually Baby Blue) which reflects the era’s sloppy tape documentation.

band_member_comments.Jerry: One reviewer calls the next Jerry tune "good" despite recording issues.
